_comment_about_this_file: Cursor project-local settings for the figma-to-code orchestration scaffold.
Claude Code hooks (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, etc.) do not port to Cursor.
Cursor enforces the write allowlist via .cursor/rules/frozen-paths.mdc (alwaysApply).
_comment_about_model: Model preference is PLAN-AWARE and ADVISORY — the figma-pipeline agents never
force a model; they use whatever Cursor's model picker provides.
• Free plan: model selection is LOCKED to Auto. Do nothing — Auto is fine;
the pipeline runs on whatever Auto selects. Never try to pin a model.
• Paid plan: prefer Composer 2.5 as the default (select it in Settings →
Models), with a Claude model as the fallback for lg/complex-extreme runs.
Cursor applies the model from its Settings → Models UI; project settings.json
